nodes.label: iOS Xcode Project Setup
nodes.description: iOS project setup: xcodeproj auto-generated by react-native init. Uses CocoaPods (pod install). Metal framework auto-linked iOS 12+. MTL_FAST_MATH=YES optimises Metal shader compilation. TFLite GPU delegate uses Metal automatically when 'gpu' parameter passed.
nodes.rationale: MTL_FAST_MATH=YES enables faster Metal shader math at cost of strict IEEE compliance — acceptable for ML inference which does not need bit-exact float ops.
